[CH10-F002] PASS if, across lines 155/173/355 revisions, no more than one beat uses the explicit negation-then-replacement construction and the remaining beats communicate the same meaning via materially different syntax; FAIL if all three still use the same formula.

[CH10-F003] PASS if the revised 329-331 span still states the key numbers but also includes a concrete non-financial interior consequence, and at least one of the three cited passages (11, 113, 329) is no longer primarily structured as step-by-step tallying; FAIL if all three remain ledger-first in the same mode.

[FBR-005] Pass if the revised line at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3312 avoids 'almost told/said' construction and still communicates avoidance under pressure. Fail if the suppression formula remains structurally intact.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each target span (83-111 and 215-239) includes at least two explicit interior beats from Eli and there is no run of 10 or more consecutive paragraphs in those spans that are purely external action/dialogue; FAIL otherwise.
findings.problem: The chapter contains two screenplay-like stretches of 10+ consecutive short paragraphs with no interior experience from the focalizer (job-intake run and drunk-guest exchange). The external action is clear, but the close-third anchor thins and emotional pressure drops.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:83 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:111, and again between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:215 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:239, add brief interior beats (thought, pain signal, memory flicker, or self-assessment) inside the exchanges without slowing scene pace. Keep dialogue turns, but thread Eli's embodied processing between leverage shifts so the POV remains interiorly anchored.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, across lines 155/173/355 revisions, no more than one beat uses the explicit negation-then-replacement construction and the remaining beats communicate the same meaning via materially different syntax; FAIL if all three still use the same formula.
findings.problem: A recurring corrective-negation formula (reject term, then replace it) appears more than twice and starts reading as autopilot rhetoric rather than fresh scene language.
findings.rewrite_direction: In snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:155, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:173, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:355, keep only one corrective-negation line and recast the others through concrete action/sensation or idiolect-specific phrasing. Preserve intent (boundary-setting and anti-redemption stance) while varying sentence architecture.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised 329-331 span still states the key numbers but also includes a concrete non-financial interior consequence, and at least one of the three cited passages (11, 113, 329) is no longer primarily structured as step-by-step tallying; FAIL if all three remain ledger-first in the same mode.
findings.problem: Eli's logistics/ledger stress mode is repeated in near-identical form at three major beats, which reads like over-literal reuse of the style-bible stress tell instead of progression. The chapter keeps re-running arithmetic cognition rather than varying how pressure lands.
findings.rewrite_direction: Differentiate one of the three accounting passages (preferably the span anchored by snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:329 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_10.md:331) by interleaving a non-ledger consequence (relational image, body memory, or specific fear tied to Nora/June/Theo). Keep financial facts intact but alter cognitive texture so each beat performs a different narrative function.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised line at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3312 avoids 'almost told/said' construction and still communicates avoidance under pressure. Fail if the suppression formula remains structurally intact.
findings.problem: Recurring full-book triple-suppression pattern (4 chapters total). This chapter's instance should be REPLACED because it duplicates a now-frequent rhetorical move.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3312 so Eli's hesitation is shown via immediate physical behavior, interruption, or one failed sentence rather than another suppression template.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into morally mixed behavior, bodily consequence, and economic detail when they are causally active. In edge cases, choose the more concrete and uncomfortable rendering unless it violates factual continuity; if two renderings are equally plausible, prefer the one that increases character accountability rather than reader reassurance.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene contains pain, sex, addiction, debt panic, or humiliation, abstract phrasing is treated as a failed draft and must be rewritten with embodied specificity.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for emphasis, legal precision, or deliberate emotional distance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate chapter architectures across the book: confrontation chapters, document-information turns, labor-process chapters, transit interiority chapters, and quiet relational chapters. Consecutive chapters must differ in scene density or dialogue-to-interiority ratio.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary American literary realism: precise, unsentimental, image-aware, and concrete under stress.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third-person anchored to Eli, with no unmarked POV drift.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Braided cadence: reflective medium-length sentences interrupted by blunt short lines at impact moments.
